solution_criteria: Meal plan covers a full 24-hour period with 4-5 meals
Protein distributed across all meals (minimum 25g per meal)
Total daily calories and macros support muscle gain for an 85kg strength athlete
Includes recovery-focused foods (carbs post-workout, protein sources, micronutrient-dense options)
task_description: Write a compact, concise, 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a strength/power athlete (weightlifter) needing elevated protein distribution across meals with caloric density and recovery-focused nutrition

prompt_inputs.goal: Match day performance and endurance maintenance

solution_criteria: Meal plan includes 5-6 eating occasions timed around morning training and afternoon match (e.g., pre-training, post-training, pre-match, during-match hydration)
Macronutrient balance supports endurance with adequate carbohydrates (55-60% of calories) and protein (1.6g per kg bodyweight) for recovery
Includes specific hydration strategy with electrolyte recommendations for variable training intensity and 90-minute match
Plan is compact and concise (fits on one page, under 400 words)
task_description: Write a compact, concise, 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a sport with dual demands (soccer player) requiring balanced macros, hydration focus, and meals timed around variable training intensity with afternoon match preparation

prompt_inputs.goal: marathon training - high endurance performance with carbohydrate loading

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers all meals for one full day (breakfast, lunch, dinner, snacks)
Emphasizes high carbohydrate intake (60-70% of calories) with moderate protein (1.2-1.6g per kg body weight)
Includes strategic timing of meals/snacks around a training session (pre/during/post workout nutrition)
Plan is compact and concise (fits on one page or brief format)
task_description: Write a compact, concise, 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a high-performance endurance athlete (marathon runner) requiring high carbohydrate and moderate protein intake with specific timing around training sessions
